ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters_city" TEXT /* City where the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company (in billion USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the company in the given year */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the ranking is applicable */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the company in the given year (in percentage) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the company's revenue compared to the previous year (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_rankings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue */,
  "revenue_million_usd" REAL /* Revenue of the company in million US dollars */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Revenue segment (e.g., Consumer Electronics, Automotive, Industrial) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the revenue is reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Country where the company is headquartered
City where the company is headquartered
Market capitalization of the company (in billion USD)
Unique identifier for each ranking entry
Rank of the company in the given year

Growth rate of the company's revenue compared to the previous year (in percentage)
